---
title: Acme Corp publishes annual transparency reports
entity: companies/acme
category: ai-safety
verdict: "true"
confidence: high
as_of: 2026-04-01
sources:
  - 2025/acme-transparency-2024
---

Acme Corp has published annual transparency reports every year since 2020. The reports cover model safety evaluations, incident tracking, and governance structure. Independent auditors from SafeAI Auditing have verified the completeness of each report. Multiple industry analyses cite Acme's transparency reports as a benchmark for the sector.
